hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
tier=$(cat .agent-forge-state/tier 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
if [ "$tier" != "micro" ] && [ "$tier" != "unknown" ]; then
  qr_done=$(cat .agent-forge-state/qr-done 2>/dev/null || echo "no")
  if [ "$qr_done" != "yes" ]; then
    echo '[agent-forge] QR gate not executed. Run /qr-gate or /milestone before committing.' >&2
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

#!/bin/bash
tier=$(cat .agent-forge-state/tier 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
if [ "$tier" != "unknown" ]; then
  echo '[agent-forge] Session ending. Checklist:' >&2
  echo '  - delta-log recorded? (/delta-log)' >&2
  echo '  - rolling-summary updated?' >&2
  echo '  - token metrics collected? (token_session_export)' >&2
  echo '  - handoff.md generated? (/handoff)' >&2
fi
